title: C# 反射：.NET 10 完全指南
summary_angle: 反射是强大的运行时工具，但有真实的性能代价——.NET 10 提供了更好的替代方案
narrative_flow: 从反射的核心 API 出发，经过性能陷阱警示，到达现代替代方案（FrozenDictionary、表达式树、[UnsafeAccessor]）
main_conclusion: 在类型编译时未知的场景合理使用反射，并用缓存、表达式树或源生成器应对性能需求

information_blocks.label: 核心 API
information_blocks.content: Type / PropertyInfo / MethodInfo / Assembly 构成反射的骨架

information_blocks.label: 性能陷阱
information_blocks.content: 每次调 GetProperty 代价高昂；ConcurrentDictionary 缓存一次查找多次复用
information_blocks.source_anchor: The Naive Pattern (Expensive) vs Cached Reflection section

information_blocks.label: FrozenDictionary
information_blocks.content: .NET 8+ 引入，写一次读多次场景无锁开销，比 ConcurrentDictionary 更快

information_blocks.label: [UnsafeAccessor]
information_blocks.content: .NET 8+ 原生速度访问私有成员，AOT 兼容，替代反射的最佳选项

comic_style_reason: 教程类文章默认使用 japanese-manga；分镜化叙事适合展示从初始 API 探索到性能优化的递进步骤
main_subject: 一位开发者角色手持放大镜对着一个发光的代码对象，镜头中映射出 Type / PropertyInfo / MethodInfo 的分解结构
main_subject_action: 用放大镜检视代码对象，镜中显示反射元数据的分层结构
composition: 左侧主人公检视场景占 60%；右侧 3 个横排信息格（核心 API、性能陷阱、FrozenDictionary）各占余下空间
background: 简洁深色背景带轻微格纹，代码字符散落其间作点缀
color_palette: 深蓝黑 + 青色高亮 + 警示橙（标注性能陷阱）
prompt: Wide cover illustration, aspect ratio 2.35:1, japanese manga style with bold ink lines, limited color palette of dark navy blue and cyan highlights with orange accent. Left 60% panel: a developer character holding a magnifying glass over a glowing .NET assembly code object, the magnifying glass reveals PropertyInfo / MethodInfo / Type fragments floating inside. Right side: three vertically stacked manga panels — top panel shows a code block with caching (ConcurrentDictionary) and speed lines; middle panel shows a FrozenDictionary icon with fast arrow and '缓存' label; bottom panel shows [UnsafeAccessor] attribute tag glowing with native-speed lightning bolt. Background: dark grid with scattered code glyphs. Text labels in Chinese: '反射' near the magnifying glass, '缓存' on middle panel, 'FrozenDictionary' on bottom label. No fake dashboards, no fake terminal, no long English phrases. Manga ink style, halftone dots in shadow areas.
